summary: Iteration 52: Lead Capture System & UX Fixes Testing Complete. All 13 features tested and verified. Logo size fix (48px), dropdown hover stability, and universal LeadCaptureModal integration working correctly across all WhatsApp touchpoints.
seed_data_creation: Created test lead with department field via POST /api/leads
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead capture system fully verified. All WhatsApp touchpoints now capture lead data before redirecting to WhatsApp.

logo_size.details: Logo height is 48px (h-12 class applied correctly)

whatsapp_dropdown_hover_stability.details: Dropdown stays open when hovering from trigger to items - gap fix (pt-1) working

header_sales_availability.details: Clicking 'Sales & Availability' in header dropdown opens LeadCaptureModal

header_request_catalog.details: Clicking 'Request Catalog (PDF)' in header dropdown opens LeadCaptureModal

header_technical_support.details: Clicking 'Technical Support' in header dropdown opens LeadCaptureModal

hero_check_availability.details: Hero 'Check Availability & Pricing' button opens LeadCaptureModal

lead_capture_modal_fields.details: Modal has all required fields: Name, Hospital, Department dropdown, Phone, Email, District dropdown

product_detail_whatsapp_enquiry.details: Product detail page 'WhatsApp Enquiry' button opens LeadCaptureModal with product name pre-filled

backend_leads_api_with_department.details: POST /api/leads with department field returns success (tested with 'Orthopedics' department)

footer_four_columns.details: Footer has 4 columns: Brand (Agile Ortho), Navigation, Locations, Compliance

mobile_action_bar.details: Mobile sticky action bar visible with Call, WhatsApp, Browse buttons. WhatsApp opens LeadCaptureModal
